basics.name: Miriam Abella
basics.label: Senior Software Developer
basics.summary: Software Developer with 5+ years of experience building high-quality web applications, RESTful APIs, and scalable frontend and backend systems. Specialized in React, TypeScript, and Clean Architecture principles, with a strong background in Test-Driven Development (TDD), CI/CD pipelines, and Agile workflows. Experienced in leading technical initiatives, driving architecture decisions, and mentoring within small teams. Passionate about product thinking, clean code, maintainable systems, and delivering real business value.

work.name: Visaflow
summary: Led the full frontend architecture redesign, defining technical guidelines, component structure, and long-term maintainability strategy for a React/TypeScript codebase.
Designed and prototyped the new application UI in Figma, ensuring responsive, accessible, and engagement-optimized layouts aligned with product goals.
Drove backend refactoring initiatives to improve scalability, separation of concerns, and clean architecture adherence across the platform.
Owned key technical decisions in a small cross-functional team, bridging design, backend, and frontend concerns from requirements to production.
Established code review practices, coding standards, and CI/CD workflow improvements to raise overall engineering quality.
Preparing and driving monthly learning sessions for junior developers on topics including Trunk-Based Development, Clean Code, and Agile methodologies.

work.name: Lifull Connect
summary: Developed and maintained real estate web applications used by thousands of users, contributing to both frontend (React, TypeScript, HTML, CSS) and backend (PHP, Ruby on Rails, Node.js) layers.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs and managed relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL), ensuring performance and data integrity.
Test-Driven Development using PHPUnit, RSpec, and Jest; authored and maintained automated test suites that significantly reduced regression bugs.
Applied Clean Code principles and hexagonal architecture patterns, improving codebase readability and long-term maintainability.
Contributed to CI/CD pipeline management, supporting continuous integration and deployment practices using Git-based workflows.
Actively participated in Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives within a collaborative engineering team.

work.name: Seidor S.L.
summary: Built Unity 3D applications in C#, designing UI interactions and immersive environments for enterprise VR solutions.
Conducted manual testing of VR applications, identifying and resolving defects that measurably reduced reported bug counts.
Researched and adopted new tools and frameworks, improving overall team delivery efficiency.
